title: B4/B8 R169 target-compatible complete-candidate replay protocol
input_description: six-active-qubit target-compatible tree interaction graph derived from the R168 FakeNairobiV2 topology control; not the R167 cycle input

candidate_event_schema.yielded_candidate: every complete mapping yielded by the VF2 iterator, retaining candidate index, mapping labels, source score bits, retained leaves, and enumeration order
candidate_event_schema.returned_candidate: the final mapping and score returned by minimize_vf2_with_score, retained separately for source replay validation
candidate_event_schema.candidate_set_boundary: only candidates yielded by the frozen source iterator are replayed; alternate search traversal is not claimed

selection_rule.replace: replace incumbent when the policy comparison is Less

claim_boundary.what_is_supported: candidate-level replay over a target-compatible OpenQASM 3 input under three operation-order profiles and four declared arithmetic policies
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: cross-input generality, a production remedy, an alternate search path, a confirmed Qiskit bug, cross-platform determinism, hardware relevance, route advantage, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
